shellCommands.command: pwd && ls -la && find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -300
find . -maxdepth 3 \( -name 'run.py' -o -name '*test*' -o -name 'README.md' -o -name 'AGENTS.md' \) -type f | sort | xargs -I{} sh -lc 'echo "===== {}"; sed -n "1,220p" "{}"'
find /home/user/workspace -maxdepth 2 -type f \( -name 'run.py' -o -name 'test_*.py' -o -name '*.py' \) | sort | xargs -r -I{} sh -lc 'echo "===== {}"; sed -n "1,260p" "{}"'

if [ -f /home/user/workspace/run.py ]; then echo '===== /home/user/workspace/run.py'; sed -n '1,260p' /home/user/workspace/run.py; fi; find /home/user/workspace -maxdepth 3 -type f | grep -E '/test[^/]*\.py$|/[^/]*test[^/]*\.py$' | sort | while read f; do echo "===== $f"; sed -n '1,260p' "$f"; done

python3 - <<'PY'
import asyncio
from run import run_tasks

async def main_ok():
    events=[]
    active=0
    peak=0
    lock=asyncio.Lock()
    def make(i):
        async def task():
            nonlocal active, peak
            async with lock:
                active += 1
                peak = max(peak, active)
                events.append(("start", i, active))
            await asyncio.sleep(0.05)
            async with lock:
                active -= 1
                events.append(("end", i, active))
        return task
    await run_tasks([make(i) for i in range(5)], 2)
    print('peak', peak)
    print('events', events)

async def main_cancel():
    started=[]
    cleaned=[]
    gate=asyncio.Event()
    def make(i):
        async def task():
            started.append(i)
            try:
                await gate.wait()
            finally:
                cleaned.append(i)
        return task
    runner = asyncio.create_task(run_tasks([make(i) for i in range(5)], 2))
    await asyncio.sleep(0.05)
    runner.cancel()
    try:
        await runner
    except asyncio.CancelledError:
        pass
    print('started', started)
    print('cleaned', cleaned)

asyncio.run(main_ok())
asyncio.run(main_cancel())
PY
